publishedAbstract: * An ODF RADOS Block Device (RBD) Persistent Volume Claim (PVC) is requested, however, it is not provisioned with its status staying in `Pending`. * Portworx Backup fails to backup a Virtual Machine of Openshift Virtualization, root disk is based on a PVC RWX of SC ocs-storagecluster-ceph-rbd-virtualization with VolumeMode Block, a PVC created from a snapshot will stay in Pending
publishedTitle: ODF RBD PVC stays in Pending with message "multi node access modes are only supported on rbd `block` type volumes"
